scope: single-state no-training exact affine coordinate-readout span audit after the full-network NTK trust radius failed; no optimizer, checkpoint, architecture, path or later-Gate change

decision_rule.pass: the fixed upstream representation contains a complete affine coordinate basis; qualify a separate two-timescale/readout-optimization mechanism before any retraining
decision_rule.rank_fail: the final coordinate features do not span the quotient target; redesign the coordinate representation rather than the optimizer
decision_rule.affine_fail: the declared final readout is not numerically affine in production; inspect the forward implementation before training
decision_rule.boundary: This one-state no-training audit cannot qualify H1a, initialize production, add steps or seeds, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
